analysis: The back half of this stretch is genuinely impressive — you put together four nights in a row above seven hours, and that 7h 56m on the 3rd is the best total of the week, with 2h 34m of REM that is honestly a little unhinged in the best way. You started around 29 June a bit rougher, with two nights under 6h 15m and some restless awake time, particularly that 1h 47m on the 1st which is a lot of lying there being a person. Deep sleep has quietly been sliding across the week though — you were hitting 45 to 51 minutes early on and by the last few nights it had dropped to the high twenties, so that's the one thing worth watching as you keep the routine locked in. Whatever stack of interventions is carrying you into those longer, calmer nights, keep doing all of it, because the awake time dropping from over an hour down to 19 minutes mid-stretch is not nothing.
